name: chatrevenue-marketplace
description: Sample Cowork-compatible plugin marketplace from ChatRevenue, used to learn the marketplace mechanics.

plugins.name: chatrevenue-hello
plugins.description: Minimal hello-world plugin that adds the /hello slash command.

plugins.name: chatrevenue
plugins.description: ChatRevenue skills bundle for sales reps: memory queries (chatrevenue-memory), watcher-fired activity help (chatrevenue-help-with-current-activity), and the standalone ICP lead-gen assistant (chatrevenue-icp-lead-gen). The first two skills need the ChatRevenue Monitor desktop app running locally; the third is standalone.
